calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: EXQ-ISEF-004 rerun: novelty bonus Goldilocks calibration with checkpoint/resume
items.note: Recovery rerun for V3-EXQ-590 after stdout-only false PASS with output_file="" and no evidence manifest. Same pre-registered design: novelty_bonus_weight in [0.1, 0.3, 0.5, 0.7, 1.0], 3 seeds, 1000 episodes, 200 steps. Script now writes a per-arm/seed checkpoint under REE_assembly/evidence/experiments/_partial so a future interruption can resume from completed seed metrics. PARTIAL RESCUE 2026-05-21: checkpoint file lives on ree-cloud-3 only (_partial/.../V3-EXQ-590a.json, 1/15 runs saved ARM_nbw01); do not run on other hosts.

items.title: EXQ-ISEF-005: 4-phase infant curriculum vs flat parameter baselines (GAP-14)
items.note: infant_substrate:GAP-14 closure. PASS confirms ARC-046 (phased residue accumulation via curriculum); unblocks DEV-NEED-008. Phase-2 cutover interrupted Mac run (~62%); no _partial checkpoint -- full rerun.

items.title: MECH-282 LPB interoceptive harm routing substrate diagnostic
items.note: Substrate readiness: 3 arms (LPB off / intero boost / external boost) with broadcast override on. C1 z_harm_intero populated; C2 intero recruits override > external; C3 external drives PAG freeze >= intero. Non-trainable routing in ree_core/regulators/lpb_interoceptive_routing.py. validate_queue + dry-run OK.

items.title: MECH-269b-followup-A staleness-into-VsRolloutGate substrate validation
items.note: IGW-20260521-021: validates use_vs_gate_staleness_lookup at default 0.4/0.5 thresholds (no smoke override). C1 staleness_lookup_calls>0 on LOOKUP_ON; C2 ON total_held > OFF severance. diagnostic substrate readiness for Q-040b narrow reading. validate_queue + dry-run OK.

items.title: Q-045 MECH-313 vs MECH-260 four-arm anti-monostrategy ablation
items.note: IGW-20260521-003 GAP-H: SD-054 reef + gated-policy + SP-CEM. 4 arms (both-off / 313 / 260 / both-on). PASS=C2 mutually load-bearing. validate_experiments + dry-run OK.

items.title: Q-044 MECH-314a/b/c sub-flavour independence ablation
items.note: IGW-20260521-003 GAP-H: all-ON baseline + three single-flavour-OFF arms. Elevated curiosity scale (5x). PASS=distinct ablation signatures. validate_experiments + dry-run OK.

items.title: Q-043 MECH-313 vs MECH-314 weight calibration sweep
items.note: IGW-20260521-003 GAP-H: 3x3 grid (noise_floor_alpha x curiosity scale). Pareto calibration zone + entropy/reef tradeoff. validate_experiments + dry-run OK.
